title: lathyrus gouanii
intro: Lathyrus gouanii, also known as Gouan's pea or Gouan's vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus gouanii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases and promote overall well-being.
